---
title: "Curriculum Vitae"
description: "CV of Andrés Martínez Glez, economist at AIReF, Madrid."
toc: true
---

[{{< fa file-pdf >}} Download PDF version](cv.pdf){.btn .btn-outline-primary}

## Current position

**Economist**, Autoridad Independiente de Responsabilidad Fiscal (AIReF) — Madrid, Spain
*[Start year] – present*

Quantitative economic research and institutional policy analysis on fiscal rules, macroeconomic forecast endorsement, labour market impacts, and long-term growth modelling.

- Lead, project on external reviews of IFIs — Economic Governance Reform Working Group, Network of EU Independent Fiscal Institutions (EUNIFI)
- [Add 2–4 more bullets: reports authored, models built, files owned]

## Education

**MSc in Economics** — [Institution], [Year]
Thesis: *[Title]*

**BSc in Economics** — [Institution], [Year]

## Selected work

- **[Report / analysis title]** — [one line on what it did and the method]
- **Long-term growth model (R)** — implementation of the European Commission's EUCAM methodology
- **[Royal Decree analysis]** — interrupted time-series analysis of the effect on Social Security affiliation

See [Research & Notes](research.qmd) for code and technical write-ups.

## Skills

**Econometrics** — time series, VAR/SVAR, forecasting, interrupted time series, panel methods
**Software** — R (tidyverse, data.table, vars, forecast), Quarto/R Markdown, Git, [add Stata/MATLAB/Python if relevant]
**Languages** — Spanish (native), English ([level]), [others]

## Presentations & professional activity

- [Item]

## Contact

[YOUR@EMAIL](mailto:YOUR@EMAIL) · [GitHub](https://github.com/AndresMtnezGlez) · [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/YOUR-LINKEDIN)
